revision.text:
[[ja:白山神社 (三木町)]] {{Expand Japanese|白山神社 (三木町)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hakusan Shrine (Q11579589) | native_name = 白山神社 | image = Shirayama Shrine.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hakusan Shrine (Q11579589) | coordinates = {{coord|34.26866666666667|134.15027777777777}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Izanagi|lt=Izanagi|ar|إزاناغي|az|İzanaqi|bcl|Izanagi|bn|ইজানাগি|bs|Izanagi|ca|Izanagi|cs|Izanagi a Izanami|da|Izanagi|el|Ιζανάγκι|en|Izanagi|eo|Izanagi|es|Izanagi|fa|ایزاناگی|fi|Izanaki|fr|Izanagi|he|איזאנגי|hr|Izanagi|hu|Izanagi|id|Izanagi|it|Izanagi|ja|イザナギ|ka|იძანაგი|ko|이자나기|lt|Idzanagis|mk|Изанаги|mni|ꯏꯓꯥꯅꯥꯒꯤ|no|Izanagi|or|ଇଜାନାଗି|pt|Izanagi|ro|Izanagi|ru|Идзанаги|simple|Izanagi|sk|Izanagi|sl|Izanagi|sr|Изанаки|sv|Izanagi|ta|இசநாகி|th|อิซานางิ|tl|Izanagi|tr|İzanagi|uk|Ідзанаґі|vi|Izanagi|zh|伊邪那岐|qid=Q813858|1=Izanagi}} }} {{nihongo|'''Hakusan Shrine'''|白山神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Sanuki Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Q135009906|ltq=Q135009906|qid=Q135009906|1=Massha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q125314093|ltq=Q125314093|qid=Q125314093|1=Hakusan shrine}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province|ja|讃岐国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11632546|1=List of Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province}} ** Series ordinal: 6 ** P155: {{ill|Q135041386|ltq=Q135041386|qid=Q135041386|1=Ohominohikono Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q11576978|ltq=Q11576978|qid=Q11576978|1=Tamura Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Miki, Kagawa|lt=Miki|arz|بلده ميكى|ca|Miki (Kagawa)|ceb|Miki Chō|en|Miki, Kagawa|es|Miki (Kagawa)|fa|میکی، کاگاوا|fr|Miki (Kagawa)|id|Miki, Kagawa|it|Miki (Kagawa)|ja|三木町|ko|미키정|ms|Miki, Kagawa|pl|Miki (Kagawa)|ro|Miki, Kagawa|ru|Мики (посёлок)|sv|Miki, Kagawa|tl|Miki, Kagawa|tr|Miki, Kagawa|uk|Мікі (Каґава)|zh|三木町|qid=Q1205980|1=Miki, Kagawa}} * {{ill|Q929682|ltq=Q929682|qid=Q929682|1=Sanuki Province}} * {{ill|Miki district|lt=Miki district|ja|三木郡|zh|三木郡|qid=Q10866143|1=Miki district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.26866666666667|134.15027777777777}} == image (P18) == * Shirayama Shrine.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q813858|ltq=Q813858|qid=Q813858|1=Izanagi}} * {{ill|Q11619891|ltq=Q11619891|qid=Q11619891|1=Kikurihime}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183226 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == legal form (P1454) == * {{ill|Q7311343|ltq=Q7311343|qid=Q7311343|1=religious corporation}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == postal code (P281) == * 761-0704https://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 8470005002202 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Wanikaha Shrine|lt=Wanikaha Shrine|qid=Q135041387|1=Wanikaha Shrine}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database ** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '香川県木田郡三木町大字下高岡973番地', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '香川県木田郡三木町井上', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:白山神社 (三木町)]] {{wikidata link|Q11579589}} == Japanese content == {{Shinto shrine |Name= Shirayama Shrine |Image= [[File:Shirayama Shrine.jpg|250px|Shirayama Shrine]]
Shimenawa pillar and worship hall |Location= {{ill|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454|qid=Q161454|1=Kagawa Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kida District|Q1155929|qid=Q1155929|1=Kita District, Kagawa}}{{ill|lt=Miki Town|Q1205980|qid=Q1205980|1=Miki, Kagawa}} Ōaza Shimotakaoka 973 |Coordinates= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Deities= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanagi-no-Mikoto|1=Izanagi|qid=Q813858}}・{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanami-no-Mikoto|1=Izanami|qid=Q682306}} |Shrine rank= {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha|Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} (small shrine) disputed shrine; former subordinate shrine of {{ill|lt=Wani-gawa Shrine|Q11674320|qid=Q11674320|1=Wanikawa Shrine}} |Founded= Unknown (theories include {{ill|lt=Engi (era name)|Q1327274|qid=Q1327274|lt=Engi|1=Enchō}} 4 ({{ill|lt=926|Q24369|qid=Q24369|1=926}})) |Main hall= |Alternate names= |Pilgrimage site= |Annual festival= The day after the first Sunday in October |Rituals= |Map= {{Location map|Japan Kagawa|label=Shirayama Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Shirayama Shrine''' (しらやまじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|lt=Miki Town|Q1205980|qid=Q1205980|1=Miki, Kagawa}}, {{ill|lt=Kida District|Q1155929|qid=Q1155929|1=Kita District, Kagawa}}, {{ill|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|Q161454|qid=Q161454|1=Kagawa Prefecture}}. It is one of the {{ill|lt=disputed shrines|Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} of Wani-gawa Shrine, a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} of {{ill|lt=Miki District|Q10866143|qid=Q10866143|1=Miki district}} in {{ill|lt=Sanuki Province|Q929682|qid=Q929682|1=Sanuki Province}}. It is situated on the southern foothills of {{ill|lt=Mount Shirayama (Kagawa Prefecture)|UNKNOWN|lt=Mount Shirayama}} (203 m above sea level), also known as {{ill|lt=Sanuki Seven Fujis|Q11632541|qid=Q11632541|lt=Miki Fuji / East Sanuki Fuji|1=Seven Sanuki Fujis}}. On the summit of Mount Shirayama are stone shrines dedicated to {{ill|lt=Takaokami-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN|lt=Dragon King Shrine}} and {{ill|lt=Ishizuchi Shrine|Q11587273|qid=Q11587273|1=Ishizuchi Shrine}}. The shrine grounds are known as a famous spot for {{ill|lt=cherry blossoms|Q871991|qid=Q871991|lt=sakura|1=Cherry blossom}}. In the past, there was a plan under the policy of the mayor of {{ill|lt=Miki Town|Q1205980|qid=Q1205980|1=Miki, Kagawa}} to plant cherry trees across the entire {{ill|lt=Sanuki Seven Fujis|Q11632541|qid=Q11632541|lt=Mount Shirayama|1=Seven Sanuki Fujis}}, but the plan was abandoned. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Izanagi|Q813858|qid=Q813858|lt=Izanagi-no-Mikoto|1=Izanagi}} * {{ill|lt=Izanami|Q682306|qid=Q682306|lt=Iyanami-no-Mikoto|1=Izanami}} === Overview === The date of foundation is unknown. According to one account, in {{ill|lt=Engi (era name)|Q1327274|qid=Q1327274|lt=Engi|1=Enchō}} 4 ({{ill|lt=926|Q24369|qid=Q24369|1=926}}), {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Myōkai Hōin|1=UNKNOWN}} received a divine revelation in a dream and invited {{ill|lt=Hakusan Gongen|Q11579578|qid=Q11579578|1=Hakusan Gongen}} to be enshrined here. Another theory attributes the founding to Haruaki (Hakusan Sōjin), a native of {{ill|lt=Echigo Province|Q1351611|qid=Q1351611|1=Koshi Province (Japan)}}. At the time of its founding, the shrine was located on the mountainside of Mount Shirayama, but it is said to have later been relocated to the foothills. It was formerly an off-site subordinate shrine of {{ill|lt=Wani-gawa Shrine|Q11674320|qid=Q11674320|1=Wanikawa Shrine}}, which is located about 1 km to the south. === Access === * 5-minute walk from {{ill|lt=Shirayama Station (Kagawa Prefecture)|Q11579619|qid=Q11579619|lt=Shirayama Station|1=Shirayama Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Nagao Line|Q5364831|qid=Q5364831|lt=Nagao Line|1=Kotoden Nagao Line}} of the {{ill|lt=Takamatsu-Kotohira Electric Railroad|Q566998|qid=Q566998|1=Takamatsu-Kotohira Electric Railroad}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto sidebar}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hakusan Shrine (Q11579589)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hakusan Shrine (Q11579589)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hakusan Shrine (Q11579589)]][[Category:Massha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Sanuki Province]] [[Category:三木町の歴史]] [[Category:Hanami spots of Japan]] [[Category:三木町の建築物]]
